name: VRL Travels
description: VRL Travels is one of the largest and most trusted private bus operators in South India, established in 1976. With a fleet of over 350 buses, VRL operates across Karnataka, Maharashtra, Goa, Andhra Pradesh, and Telangana, offering daily services on major intercity routes.

name: SRS Travels
description: SRS Travels is a premium intercity bus service provider operating primarily in South India. Known for its Volvo multi-axle fleet and luxury sleeper coaches, SRS connects major cities across Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Andhra Pradesh, and Maharashtra with punctual and comfortable services.

name: KPN Travels
description: KPN Travels India is a well-established bus operator headquartered in Salem, Tamil Nadu. Founded in 1989, KPN has grown to become one of the most recognized names in South Indian road transport, offering seater, semi-sleeper, and air-conditioned Volvo buses across Tamil Nadu, Karnataka, Kerala, and Andhra Pradesh.

address.street: 52, Five Roads Circle, Omalur Main Road
